_metadata.name: Cloud Security Compliance Audit
_metadata.description: Automated compliance checking workflow that runs Prowler against your AWS infrastructure, compares findings against CIS benchmarks, generates a compliance report, and stores results as an artifact. Perfect for continuous compliance monitoring.
_metadata.author: sentris-team

manifest.name: Cloud Security Compliance Audit
manifest.description: Run Prowler compliance checks, analyze against CIS benchmarks, and generate reports.
manifest.author: sentris-team

data.description: Trigger weekly compliance audit (schedule or manual)
Retrieve AWS credentials for the target account
Execute Prowler CIS Benchmark checks against the AWS account
Process Prowler findings and calculate compliance score per service

config.script: const findings = input.results || []; const passed = findings.filter(f => f.status === 'PASS').length; const failed = findings.filter(f => f.status === 'FAIL').length; const total = passed + failed; const score = total > 0 ? Math.round((passed / total) * 100) : 0; const byService = {}; findings.forEach(f => { if (!byService[f.service]) byService[f.service] = { passed: 0, failed: 0 }; byService[f.service][f.status === 'PASS' ? 'passed' : 'failed']++; }); return { score, passed, failed, total, byService, criticalFindings: findings.filter(f => f.status === 'FAIL' && f.severity === 'critical') };

data.description: Store the full compliance report as a downloadable artifact
Notify the security team with compliance score and critical findings

requiredSecrets.name: aws_access_key_id
requiredSecrets.description: AWS access key ID for the target account

requiredSecrets.name: aws_secret_access_key
requiredSecrets.description: AWS secret access key for the target account

requiredSecrets.name: slack_webhook_url
requiredSecrets.description: Slack webhook URL for compliance notifications
